category_sources: source_facts.description says command-line utility for Meshery cloud native management plane; official docs describe mesheryctl managing Meshery and cloud native functions.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and executable are mesheryctl; official Meshery CLI docs use mesheryctl as the command name.
docs_sources: Official Meshery docs provide a using Meshery CLI guide and command-line reference.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/meshery/meshery, so repo is returned as null per instruction not to second-guess populated repos.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies cloud native management plane; official Meshery CLI docs list Kubernetes, lifecycle, performance, design, and registry management commands.
